'\nContext: '+$json.context : '' }}"}]

parameters.query: INSERT INTO sn_error_encyclopedia (error_pattern,title,description,root_cause,fix_steps,category,severity,source) VALUES (SUBSTRING($1,1,200),$2,$3,$4,$5::jsonb,$6,$7,'ai_generated') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{success:false,error:'error_message required'}}];
